prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the rough composition guide and REFERENCE_1 as the character/pose guide, turn the sketch into a polished, high-energy manga/anime illustration. Keep the same 4-character arrangement: 1 huge muscular student centered in back flexing one arm, 1 small white-haired student at lower left in a crouched/action pose, 1 slim standing student at right raising a fist, and 1 shocked pink-haired close-up face cropped at the bottom left. Convert the loose colored sketch into clean inked line art with vibrant cel shading, sharp comic-panel energy, and exaggerated perspective. Add a chaotic explosion background behind the three full-body characters with orange-yellow fire bursts, smoke puffs, speed lines, impact spikes, and comic burst shapes. Add 2 visible Japanese text elements: a large top-left sound effect カオス! and a jagged speech bubble at bottom right reading えぇっ!?\n私の制服!?. Preserve the school-uniform theme from REFERENCE_1 but render it as finished clothing: mint sweater and teal skirt styling for the center and left characters, a dark fitted uniform for the right character, and a close-up shocked face in the lower-left foreground. Use a dynamic shonen-comedy manga page style with thick outlines, dramatic motion lines, saturated colors, and layered comic effects.
